default_system_prompt: Optional persona appended to the base Telegram prompt for every topic/chat without its own prompt.

chat_prompts.REPLACE_WITH_DM_CHAT_ID: Custom prompt for this DM/chat, appended on top of the persona. Set it from Telegram with /sysprompt.

REPLACE_WITH_PROJECT_THREAD_ID.name: My Project
REPLACE_WITH_PROJECT_THREAD_ID.system_prompt: Optional per-topic prompt, appended on top of the persona. Set it from Telegram with /sysprompt.
